task.reason: Beacon at 80% already implemented in useAttentionBeacon.ts
Use existing /api/users/location instead of new API

story.title: Space Capacity and "Room Full" Handling
story.description: As a user, I want clear visual indication when a space is at capacity, so that I don't try to join full spaces and get blocked.
story.scopeNote: Reduced from original 12 tasks after audit found existing functionality

file.purpose: Add FullBadge and dimmed styling when space is full
file.note: CapacityIndicator ALREADY integrated at lines 345-350 - DO NOT ADD AGAIN
file.changeRequired: - Calculate: const isFull = space.capacity > 0 && usersInSpace.length >= space.capacity - Import FullBadge from './FullBadge' - Render FullBadge when isFull - Add dimmed styling: opacity: 0.7, filter: grayscale(0.3) when isFull

file.purpose: Disable Join button when space is full
file.changeRequired: - Add isFull?: boolean to SpaceActionButtonsProps - Disable Join button when isFull - Add title="Space is full - cannot join" - Add aria-disabled={isFull} - Style: opacity: 0.5, cursor: not-allowed when disabled

- Import existing CapacityIndicator from './StatusIndicators' - Calculate isFull from space.capacity and usersInSpace.length - Pass isFull to SpaceActionButtons - Add CapacityIndicator below participant roster header

file.purpose: Add capacity validation before updating location
file.note: DO NOT create new /api/spaces/[id]/join - use this existing API
file.changeRequired: - If spaceId is provided, fetch space.capacity and current occupancy count - If occupancy >= capacity, return 409 Conflict - Error body: { error: "Space is full", code: "SPACE_FULL" } - Otherwise proceed with existing updateLocation logic

file.purpose: Contains existing CapacityIndicator - REUSE, DO NOT RECREATE
file.note: Already exported, already integrated in ModernSpaceCard

file.purpose: 80% capacity beacon already works - NO CHANGES NEEDED
file.note: Lines 136-145 already trigger beacon at occupancyThreshold (default 0.8)

file.purpose: Badge component displaying "Full" status on space cards

constraint.rule: DO NOT create CapacityIndicator - it exists in StatusIndicators.tsx
DO NOT modify useAttentionBeacon.ts - 80% trigger already works
DO NOT add Space.capacity type - it exists in database.ts

test.description: SpaceActionButtons Join button disabled when isFull=true
PUT /api/users/location returns 409 when space is full
